workflow_instructions.mode_overview: Comprehensive code review mode that performs systematic analysis across the entire repository. This mode identifies bugs, performance issues, naming convention violations, ESLint errors, code smells, and security vulnerabilities without making commits. All findings are documented for manual review and approval.

step.details: Parse the user's request to identify: - Target directories or files for analysis - Specific focus areas (bugs, performance, security, etc.) - Depth of traversal (single directory, recursive, or entire repository) - Any exclusions or special considerations

tools.tool: list_files - Understand project structure and identify directories to analyze
read_file - Examine configuration files (eslint.config.js, package.json, etc.) to understand project standards
search_files - Find existing code review documentation or standards

step.details:
Choose traversal approach: - Depth-first: Complete analysis of each directory before moving to siblings - Breadth-first: Analyze all directories at current level before going deeper - Priority-based: Focus on critical areas first (e.g., security-sensitive files)
Consider repository size and complexity to determine batch processing strategy

phase.name: directory_traversal
phase.description: Systematically traverse repository structure directory by directory

step.title: Initialize Analysis State
step.description: Set up tracking for progress and findings

step.title: Process Current Directory
step.description: Analyze all files in the current directory

actions.action: List all files in current directory
Filter files by type and relevance

step.validation: Confirm all files in directory have been analyzed

step.title: Move to Next Directory
step.description: Progress to next directory based on traversal strategy
step.validation: Verify traversal is progressing as planned

phase.name: file_analysis
phase.description: Perform multi-dimensional analysis on each file

step.title: File Type Detection
step.description: Identify file type and appropriate analysis approach

step.title: Bug Identification
step.description: Search for bugs and classify by severity

actions.action: Detect memory leaks or resource issues

step.title: Naming Convention Review
step.description: Check variable, function, and class naming

actions.action: Verify naming consistency with project standards

step.validation: Confirm naming issues are clearly documented

step.title: ESLint Rule Compliance

actions.action: Run ESLint on the file (if available)

step.validation: Verify ESLint issues are properly documented

step.title: Code Smell Detection

actions.action: Check for long methods or functions
Find tight coupling or poor separation

step.validation: Verify code smells are clearly described

step.title: Security Vulnerability Assessment
step.validation: Verify security issues are properly classified

step.title: Compile Findings
step.description: Aggregate all findings for the current file
step.validation: Verify findings are comprehensive and actionable

step.title: Compile Directory Summary
step.description: Create summary for each analyzed directory

actions.action: Calculate statistics (bugs found, performance issues, etc.)

step.title: Generate Comprehensive Report
step.validation: Verify report is complete and well-structured

step.title: Document Findings
step.description: Present findings to user for manual review

completion_criteria.criterion: All target directories have been analyzed
All files in scope have been reviewed
Findings are documented with severity classifications
Remediation suggestions are specific and actionable
No commits have been made to the repository

tracking_method.implementation: - Create .analysis-progress file to track completed directories - Update after each directory analysis - Allow resumption if interrupted

guidelines.guideline: For large repositories, process directories in batches of 10-20 files
Provide progress updates after each batch
Allow pausing and resuming between batches

error_scenario.name: file_access_error
error_scenario.description: Unable to read or access a file

response.action: Log the error and skip the file

error_scenario.name: large_repository
error_scenario.description: Repository is too large for single analysis

response.action: Process in batches with progress tracking
Provide option to analyze specific directories
Use general ESLint rules as fallback
Document that ESLint analysis is limited
